title: RAG Architecture Overview
description: High-level view of the RAG pipeline showing the Retrieve-Augment-Generate flow
source_prompt: RAG pipeline overview with 3 labeled sections: R (retrieve), A (augment), G (generate)

title: RAG vs Fine-Tuning Decision Tree
description: Decision tree helping choose between RAG, fine-tuning, and prompt engineering
source_prompt: Decision tree for RAG vs fine-tuning vs prompt engineering based on knowledge and behavior needs

title: Chunking Strategies Comparison
description: Side-by-side comparison of fixed-size, recursive, and semantic chunking
source_prompt: Three-column comparison of chunking strategies with pros, cons, and best-for recommendations

title: Vector Search Visualization
description: How vector similarity search finds nearest neighbors in embedding space
source_prompt: Vector space with query vector, document dots, cosine similarity scores, and top-K selection

title: Production RAG Stack
description: Full production RAG architecture showing tools at each layer
source_prompt: 5-layer production stack: client, orchestration, retrieval, generation, data pipeline with tool names and costs

title: Hybrid Retrieval Flow
description: How keyword (BM25) and semantic search combine via Reciprocal Rank Fusion
source_prompt: Dual-path flow: keyword search + semantic search merging at RRF with comparison callout

title: RAG Evaluation Pipeline
description: Three-stage evaluation flow: retrieval quality, generation quality, end-to-end metrics
source_prompt: Evaluation pipeline with Recall@K, Faithfulness, F1 metrics and feedback loop to parameter tuning

title: Cost-Latency Tradeoff Matrix
description: Comparison grid of embedding models, vector DBs, and LLMs with cost and latency
source_prompt: Grid comparing embedding models, vector DBs, LLMs with budget and production build paths highlighted
